skills.name: Feature Engineering
skills.description: Design ML features with encoding, scaling, selection, and extraction. Outputs feature pipelines, importance analysis, and validation strategies.
skills.promptPreview: Design ML features with encoding, scaling, selection, extraction, feature pipelines, importance analysis, and validation strategies.

skills.name: Hyperparameter Tuning
skills.description: Optimize ML model hyperparameters with grid search, random search, Bayesian optimization. Outputs tuning strategy, search spaces, and best parameters.
skills.promptPreview: Optimize model hyperparameters with grid search, random search, Bayesian optimization to find best parameters within compute budget.

skills.name: ML Pipeline
skills.description: Design end-to-end ML pipelines from data ingestion to model serving. Outputs training workflows, experiment tracking, and model registry.
skills.promptPreview: Design end-to-end ML pipelines with data ingestion, preprocessing, training, experiment tracking, model registry, and serving.

skills.name: Model Deployment
skills.description: Deploy ML models to production with FastAPI, TorchServe, or SageMaker. Outputs serving infrastructure, scaling, monitoring, and A/B testing.
skills.promptPreview: Deploy ML models with FastAPI, TorchServe, or SageMaker including serving infrastructure, scaling, monitoring, and A/B testing.

skills.name: Model Monitoring
skills.description: Monitor ML models in production for drift, performance degradation, and data quality. Outputs metrics, alerts, and retraining triggers.
skills.promptPreview: Monitor ML models for data drift, concept drift, performance degradation with metrics, alerts, and automated retraining triggers.

skills.name: Prompt Engineering
skills.description: Design effective prompts for LLMs (GPT, Claude, Llama). Outputs prompt templates, few-shot examples, chain-of-thought reasoning, and evaluation metrics.
skills.promptPreview: Design effective prompts with templates, few-shot examples, chain-of-thought reasoning, and systematic evaluation metrics.

skills.name: RAG Architecture
skills.description: Design Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems with vector databases, chunking strategies, and hybrid search. Outputs architecture, embedding pipelines, and retrieval optimizations.
skills.promptPreview: Design RAG systems with vector databases, chunking strategies, hybrid search, embedding pipelines, and retrieval optimizations.
